doc.purpose: Cemu emulated-controller profile content (the Deck-proven XML pinning the Steam Virtual Gamepad through SDL) as data, substituted by CemuEmitter. Variables: ${emulator_name} the contract name; ${profile_name} / ${controller_api} / ${controller_display_name} the steam_input.json device identities. Cemu requires the profile file name to equal the <profile> element inside it, so ${profile_name} renders in both the path and the body.
doc.grammar: Cemu's controllerProfiles XML wire format: tab-indented elements, 'Wii U GamePad' the emulated-controller type, rumble strength 0.
